text:
よし、こんなものか。
今回もさすがと言うべきか
想像以上に良い探索になった。

やはりお前と行く探索は
得られるものが多いな。

ともあれ、良い練習になった。
では、一度帰還す

That should about do it. That even better
than I expected-- which is, I guess, about what
I expect from you at this point.

Going out exploring with you certainly is
rewarding for me.

Anyway, fine work as always.
Shall we make for the ship?
